p.strong: Leaf overflow → split → promote separator → possible cascade to root

div.p: page_insert_cell() returns -1 Free space < cell_size + CELL_PTR_SIZE
Merge existing N cells + 1 overflow cell into a single sorted array by key (rowid)
m = (N+1) / 2 Median divides cells into two balanced halves
Reuse original page_id; overwrite with left-half cells
pool_new_page() → fresh page for right half
*promoted_key = entries[m].key = 30 Invariant after split: ∀ key in LEFT: key < promoted_key (10,20,25 < 30) ✓ ∀ key in RIGHT: key ≥ promoted_key (30,40,50,60 ≥ 30) ✓
The separator key tells the parent: "keys ≤ 30 → go LEFT, keys > 30 → go RIGHT"
Create an internal cell and insert into parent page

p.strong: Cascade continues until a non-full ancestor is found or the root itself must split.

div.p: When the ROOT page overflows, a new root is created. This is the ONLY operation that increases tree height.

ol.li: Balance: all root-to-leaf paths have equal depth
Order: keys in left < separator ≤ keys in right
Occupancy: both pages are ≥ half full (⌊(N+1)/2⌋ cells min)
Parent consistency: separator key correctly routes searches
Dirty pages: all modified pages marked dirty via pool_mark_dirty
Pin discipline: all fetched pages unpinned after modification

ul.li: Split cost: O(N) cells copied per split
Cascade depth: O(h) where h = tree height
Height increase: at most 1 per insertion (root split only)
With fanout f ≈ 100: height 3 holds f³ = 10⁶ rows

div.p: New cell to insert:
[varint(payload_sz)] [varint(rowid)] [record...]
Cannot fit: ptr_array_end + 2 > cell_content_start - cell_size
Index: 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 Key: [10] [20] [25] [30] [40] [50] [60] ▲ overflow cell inserted here Total = N + 1 = 7 cells

ul.li: entries[m] goes to the RIGHT page (leaf cells are NOT removed from leaves)
Left: entries[0..m-1], Right: entries[m..N] For INTERNAL splits:
The median cell is REMOVED (promoted only)

div.p: ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ Header: type=0x05 cell_count=2 │ │ right_child = page_id(RIGHT) │ ├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤ │ Internal Cell 0: │ │ left_child = ... key = 15 │ │ Internal Cell 1: ◄── NEW │ │ left_child = LEFT_PAGE key = 30 │ │ │ │ Interpretation: │ │ keys ≤ 15 → child of cell 0 │ │ 15 < keys ≤ 30 → LEFT_PAGE │ │ keys > 30 → right_child (RIGHT_PAGE) │ └─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
Height = 1 (root is the only page) ┌──────────────────────┐ │ ROOT (INTERNAL) │ │ cell_count = FULL │ │ + overflow cell │ └──────────────────────┘ ╱ │ ╲ child_0 child_1 ... child_N

Height = 2 (increased by 1) ┌───────────────────────┐ │ NEW ROOT (INTERNAL) │ │ cell_count = 1 │ │ cell[0]: left=OLD │ │ key=median │ │ right_child = NEW │ └───────────────────────┘ ╱ ╲ ┌──────────────┐ ┌──────────────┐ │ OLD ROOT │ │ NEW SIBLING │ │ (left half) │ │ (right half) │ │ keys < med │ │ keys > med │ └──────────────┘ └──────────────┘ ╱ │ ╲ ╱ │ ╲
